author: Will DePue
name: 12L Int5-MLP + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA (1.1433 BPB)
blurb: 12-layer transformer (dim=512, 8H/4KV GQA) with mixed int5/int6 quantization, SmearGate, BigramHash (2048 buckets, dim=96), U-Net skip connections, orthogonal init, SWA/50. Muon optimizer (LR=0.025, momentum=0.98, WD=0.04). PyTorch 2.8 SDPA at seq1024, ~9000 steps in 600s.
